tasks.title: Mechanical fail-closed primitives: Band zero-value, never-auto floor, remediation lane

scenarios: An unmatched band value stringifies as POLL_PAUSE
Irreversible operation classes are on the never-auto floor
A reversible operation class is not on the never-auto floor
The remediation lane fails closed by default

tasks.title: core/risk.Classifier typed admission gate: emit AUTO / AUTO_NOTICE / POLL_PAUSE; write session_risk_audit

scenarios: A low-risk reversible action is classified AUTO
A reversible-mixed action on a critical host is classified AUTO_NOTICE
A high-risk irreversible action is classified POLL_PAUSE
An incident with no learned prior is classified POLL_PAUSE
An AUTO-RESOLVE lacking bound evidence is downgraded to a poll

tasks.title: Deterministic secret/PII redaction in the input screen (core/screen.Scrub) before model/log/ledger

scenarios: A leaked credential in the untrusted seed is redacted before it reaches the model or the ledger
A benign alert body is not mangled by the secret redaction pass
